page_metadata.biotools__summary: This tool is proposed to identify disease-related genes. It is divided into three steps: module partition, genes prioritization in each disease-associated module, and rank fusion for the global ranking.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This tool is proposed to identify disease-related genes. It is divided into three steps: module partition, genes prioritization in each disease-associated module, and rank fusion for the global ranking.
